title: デビュー戦の後に・長き坂のはじまり

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... It's... over?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My mind was completely blank the whole time,
but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I finished the race. I did, didn't I? Then everyone
must've seen my running and felt how badly I
wanted to—

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's all for the races this afternoon, huh?
Kitasan Black sure gave it the ol' college try.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Now, then! Here's were things actually get
interesting. The next race has...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... This hurts so much! It feels like someone
just threw cold water in my face... I didn't realize
how insignificant I was in other people's eyes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though her performance was more than
respectable, Kitasan Black looks miserable
coming back from the race.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was on a different level! I knew the
Twinkle Series was going to be hard going in, but
I'm nowhere near qualified to run in it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's pace was so fast, and I felt terrified on
the track! It was all I could do to just run like mad!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It felt like I'd be pushed right into last place if I
let my guard down for even a second...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: So this is what my dad and his students meant by the uncertainty of only getting one shot...
choice_data_list: Did they used to say that a lot?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! They'd be like, "You only get one shot on
stage, and there's no telling what will happen. But
that uncertainty is what makes things interesting."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know singing on stage and racing on a track are
two different things, but I bet this is what they
were talking about.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I realized something else, too. It's not enough for
me to simply run as hard as I possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I mean, not a single person was moved or thrilled
by my running today...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anyone could've run like I did. There's no way I
can make anyone happy with something so
mediocre! It didn't even matter to anyone that I
was out there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black grits her teeth in frustration as she
realizes just how far she is from her goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, this is a universal realization that dawns on
everyone, and it is certainly not a bad thing to
understand.
choice_data_list:
This is just the start, so let's keep building
ourselves up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Yeah, you're right! I already knew I had a
long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's just that it'll take me more than a single leap
to reach my goal. But that's racing for you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! What I lack is strength! Without it,
nobody'll even spare me a glance, let alone crack
a smile.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've got to get way stronger by the time the
Classic Triple Crown rolls around next year.
choice_data_list: All right. Then let's start with the basics.
All right. Then let's start with the basics.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The basics! Yeah, a good foundation is a must!
I've seen tons of Umas work their tails off after
debuting and go on to do great things.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Now it's my turn! As they say, a journey of a
thousand miles begins with a single step!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black tends to rush headlong into things
and isn't very graceful, so taking things slow is
definitely the right call.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to help raise her skills and strength
slowly while entering her in races that best suit
her strengths.
